title: Craft Sounds
description: Adds dynamic sound effects and a light particle animation for crafting items [Vanilla Refresh]
body:
## About
Adds dynamic sound effects and a light particle animation for crafting items. The sound is heard by yourself and other players nearby.

This is only compatible with vanilla items

## Variability
The sound can vary depending on how much you craft and what you're crafting. Sounds vary under the following conditions
- General: when crafting any item
- Stacks: when crafting more than one item at once/item stacks
- Crafting any tool
- Crafting iron tools/armor
- Crafting diamond tools/armor
- Crafting netherite tools/armor
- Heavy Wood: when crafting chests, barrels, and certain workbenches
- Workstations (grindstones, smithing tables, etc)
- Anvil
- Beacon
- Conduit
- Disc 5
- Enchanting Table
- Eye of Ender
- Mace

***

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cb3a46154a963daf8bc8026bb711cfbec968c32.png)

This pack is a standalone, mini-pack of a feature from [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh)
